apis.name: init
apis.type: Chain → ContractCallContext → Setup → Except Error State

apis.name: try_transfer
apis.type: Address → Address → TokenValue → State → Except Error State

apis.name: try_transfer_from
apis.type: Address → Address → Address → TokenValue → State → Except Error State

apis.name: try_approve
apis.type: Address → Address → TokenValue → State → Except Error State

apis.name: receive
apis.type: Chain → ContractCallContext → State → Option Msg → Except Error (State × List ActionBody)

spec_metadata.name: spec_init_direct
semantic_bridge_required: Direct API coverage for the scored helper surface exposed in Bundle; source behavior is the Coq init definition.

spec_metadata.name: spec_try_transfer_direct
semantic_bridge_required: Direct API coverage for the scored helper surface exposed in Bundle; FMap behavior is represented by stateWF and extensional map helpers.

spec_metadata.name: spec_outgoing_acts_nil
semantic_bridge_required: ConCert reachable/env_contracts/outgoing_acts semantics are represented by the operational ChainTrace model with deploy and receive/call steps.
reachable carries chainStateWF so the list-map chain model preserves the source FMap representation invariant.

spec_metadata.name: spec_total_supply_eq_init_supply
semantic_bridge_required: ConCert ChainTrace/deployment_info/contract_state semantics are represented by the operational ChainTrace model and final-state deployment metadata.
reachable carries chainStateWF so the list-map chain model preserves the source FMap representation invariant.

spec_metadata.name: spec_sum_balances_eq_total_supply
semantic_bridge_required: ConCert reachable/env_contracts/contract_state semantics are represented by the operational ChainTrace model with deployment and receive/call transitions.
reachable carries chainStateWF so the list-map chain model preserves the source FMap representation invariant.

test_cases.name: guard_init_owner_supply
test_cases.nl_description: Initialization puts the full initial supply in the owner balance and leaves allowances empty.

test_cases.name: guard_try_transfer_success
test_cases.nl_description: A sender with enough balance can transfer tokens to another address.

test_cases.name: guard_try_transfer_insufficient_balance
test_cases.nl_description: A transfer fails with the default error when the sender lacks balance.

test_cases.name: guard_try_approve_sets_allowance
test_cases.nl_description: Approval records the requested delegate allowance for the caller.

test_cases.name: guard_try_transfer_from_success
test_cases.nl_description: A delegate with enough allowance can transfer from the owner and spends that allowance.

test_cases.name: guard_try_transfer_from_insufficient_allowance
test_cases.nl_description: A delegated transfer fails when the delegate allowance is too small.

test_cases.name: guard_try_transfer_from_missing_owner_allowance
test_cases.nl_description: A delegated transfer fails when the owner has no allowance map.

test_cases.name: guard_try_transfer_from_wrong_delegate
test_cases.nl_description: A delegated transfer fails when the delegate has no allowance entry.

test_cases.name: guard_receive_dispatch_transfer
test_cases.nl_description: Receive dispatches a transfer message to transfer and returns no outgoing actions.

test_cases.name: guard_receive_dispatch_transfer_from
test_cases.nl_description: Receive dispatches transfer_from and returns no outgoing actions.

test_cases.name: guard_receive_dispatch_approve
test_cases.nl_description: Receive dispatches approve and returns no outgoing actions.

test_cases.name: guard_receive_default_none
test_cases.nl_description: Receive rejects calls without a message.

test_cases.name: guard_receive_rejects_payable
test_cases.nl_description: Receive rejects calls with a positive attached amount.
